name: George Frideric Handel
title: Composer
bio: German-born British Baroque composer famous for his operas, oratorios, and concertos. Best known for 'Messiah,' one of the most performed choral works in Western music.
faith: A committed Christian whose masterwork 'Messiah' sets to music the life of Jesus Christ from prophecy through resurrection. Upon completing the 'Hallelujah Chorus,' he reportedly said, 'I did think I did see all Heaven before me, and the great God Himself.'

sources.title: Messiah (Handel) — Wikipedia
sources.note: Detailed history of the oratorio and its biblical text

sources.title: Handel's Messiah: Comfort for God's People
sources.note: By Calvin Stapert. Explores the theological depth of Handel's masterwork

tagline: Saw all Heaven before him while composing the Hallelujah Chorus
